# Strategic Analysis of Over-The-Shoulder "Command Center" [[.agents/skills/banner-creator/references/formats|Formats]]
## Algorithmic Viability, Audience Retention, and Monetization Compliance in 2026
### Source: Gemini Deep Research — May 12, 2026

---

## KEY FINDINGS SUMMARY

### 1. YouTube Does NOT Require Face-on-Camera for Monetization
- No YouTube policy requires showing your face
- Over-the-shoulder format satisfies "human presence" algorithm signals
- Physical desk, hands, shoulder, back of head = "proof of work" that defeats the AI slop penalty

### 2. Retention Data — OTS Beats Face-on-Camera for Educational Content

| Format | First 60s Retention | Avg View Duration (10m Video) |
|---|---|---|
| Face-on-Camera | 65-70% | 40-45% |
| Fully Faceless (Stock/AI) | 35-45% | 20-25% |
| **Over-the-Shoulder / [[.agents/rules/workspace|Workspace]]** | **55-65%** | **45-50%** |

(Creator Plan)
- Must check "Altered Content" disclosure box in YouTube Studio
- Failure to disclose = strikes, demonetization, account termination
- Disclosure label does NOT harm algorithmic reach

### 4. The Hybrid Workflow (OTS A-Roll + AI B-Roll) = Optimal
- Start with real OTS footage to establish trust
- Cut to AI-generated educational B-roll
- Return to OTS to reaffirm human presence
- AI B-roll must match lighting/color grade of real footage

### 5. Technical Requirements
- **Lens:** 50-85mm medium telephoto (85mm ideal)
- **Aperture:** f/1.8 - f/2.8 for shallow depth of field
- **Camera distance:** 4-6 feet behind subject
- **Key light:** Side-positioned, 45-90 degrees
- **Rim/hair light:** Behind monitors, pointing back at camera (CRITICAL for separation)
- **Practical lights:** RGB LED tubes, monitor glow, desk lamps

### 6. Successful Channel Archetypes Using OTS Format
- Clutterbug: 1.25M subs (productivity/organization)
- AtHomeWithNikki: 549K subs
- Marc Romboy, Francois Rengere: 100K-500K+ (music production)
- Hipyo Tech, Basically Homeless: 1-2M+ (tech hardware)
- Coding/Dev channels: 100K-1M+

### 7. July 2025 "Inauthentic Content" Policy
- Targets mass-produced, repetitive, low-value content
- OTS format is the "ultimate defense" against this crackdown
- Physical environment = algorithmic proof of human agency
